DEFENDANT SAMSON CHU???S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF GREGORY DODD [TRANSFERRED FROM 9:30 CALENDAR]
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SASHA M. JAMSHIDI, Esq. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP (Tel: 760-557-2940) for defendant Samson Chu;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAMSON CHU'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF GREGORY DODD.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed. Motion for Terminating Sanctions for Failure to Comply with Discovery Order Granted.

Defense counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to the opposing side for approval as to the form, and then submit the proposed order to the pro tem judge at rkane1089@aol.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
